ab: rasun simu pasaba biru musa i ragiyax riyax sawni.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去山上。
en: I will take you to the mountains today.

ab: kamayan ku yaya maha u payux putut i ragiyax.
ch: B:媽媽說山上有很多蚊子。
en: Mom says that there are lots of mosquitoes in the mountains.

ab: rasun simu pasaba biru musa i sala riyax sawni.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去田裡。
en: I will take you to the fields.

ab: musa ta i tamabun uraw aw?
en: Are we going to loosen the soil?

ab: musa ta inu kisa?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: rasun ta ni pasaba biru musa i siyaw gawng.
en: Teacher will take us to the riverside.

ab: musa ta inu kisa?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: rasun ta ni pasaba biru musa i ragiyax.
en: Teacher will take us to the mountains today.

ab: musa ta siyaw gawng riyax sawni aw?
en: Are we going to the riverside today?

ab: ayat, rasun ta ni pasaba biru musa i ragiyax.
ch: B:不是，老師要帶我們去山上。
en: No, our teacher is going to take us to the mountains.

ab: musa ta ragiyax riyax sawni aw?
en: Are we going to the mountains today?

ab: ayat, musa ta i sala riyax sawni.
ch: B:不是，我們今天要去田裡。
en: No, we are going to the fields.

ab: pasaba biru, nanu ku halan ta matayux siyaw gawng?
ch: A:老師，我們到河邊要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see at the riverside?

ab: musa ta matayux layngun.
en: We are going to see dragonflies.

ab: pasaba biru, nanu ku halan ta matayux i ragiyax?
ch: A:老師，我們到山上要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see in the mountains?

ab: musa ta matayux piray.
en: We are going to see butterflies.

ab: nanu ku halan ta matayuwaw i sala?
en: What are we going to do in the fields?

ab: musa ta matayux panuhiy ta tiyay i sala, pinbaga na tahiy ru banga ki!
ch: B:我們要到田裡看我們種的玉米，要小心有螞蟻、蜜蜂唷!
en: We are going to see the corn we grow in the fields, but you need to be aware of the ants and bees.

ab: pasaba biru, musa ta malangiya siyaw gawng aw?
ch: A:老師我們要到河邊游泳嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to swim in the river?

ab: ayat, musa ta matayux na layngun.
en: No, we are going to see dragonflies.

ab: pasaba biru, musa ta muhiy tabihi sala aw?
ch: A:老師我們要到田裡種菜嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to grow some vegetables in the fields?

ab: musa ta tamabun uraw riyax sawni.
en: We are going to loosen the soil today.

ab: kiyan na layngun palaka kiya.
en: There are dragonflies flying around.

ab: nanak sawni ku mintayux kung su mayanux na layngun.
ch: B:我今天才看過真正活著的蜻蜓。
en: Today is the first time I see real living dragonflies.

ab: kiyan piray ku niya palaka kiya.
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: ye! wa! sagalan mu balay ku piray, tiya kinbaytunux.
ch: B:耶!哇!我喜歡蝴蝶，很漂亮。
en: Yeh! Wow! I love butterflies. They are very beautiful.

ab: kiyan piray ku niya palaka kiya.
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: ayat piray ku hasa, hasa ga banga.
en: Those are not butterflies. They are bees.

ab: yangay ti runi, ka’usa twahiy sa’ayung ki!
ch: A:在這裡看一看，不要到太遠的地方唷!
en: Come here and take a look. Don’t go too far!

ab: aw, ayat sami musa twahiy sa’ayung.
ch: B:好，我們不會去太遠的地方。
en: Got it, we won’t go anywhere too far.

ab: laxiy i pazinah, tahuway hamakay ba’a su matakuy.
ch: A:不要用跑的，慢慢走免得跌倒了。
en: Don’t run and walk slowly lest you fall down.

ab: maha kung naki mu yanga taxan.
en: I want to see them right away.
